positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette of a mountain range at sunset, viewed from a calm lake. The sky should transition through deep indigo, warm orange, and soft pink gradients. Focus on clean, bold lines and graphic shapes. Foreground elements include scattered, stylized abstract flora and crisp geometric reflections on the glassy water surface. The overall style should be inspired by negative space art and modern graphic design, with high contrast between the deep silhouettes and the vibrant sky. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, noisy, grain, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, logo, copyright, trademark
